content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.03%, IT crashing -4.65%, VIX up 3.55% to 19.25 — classic risk-off tape. FII/DII data unavailable (likely pre-close). Book is 68% deployed with net unrealized -0.3%; priority is position management, not fresh entries. Binary catalysts ahead: AUBANK Apr 27 results, Granules Apr 29, HUL Apr 30.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -6.2% but SL at 75 still below CMP 76.48. Q4 results were strong (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%). PSU Bank index only -0.82% so sector not broken. Stock found support near 76 intraday and held VWAP 76.57. SL at 75 = ~2% further downside risk. Hold with current SL; if 75 breaks, SL will trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.0,
      "new_target": 1100.0,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +4.5%, strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%). Current SL 1007.15 is actually ABOVE CMP 1023 — that's a bug/inversion. Setting SL to 995 (just below today's low 995 and below pivot support 978) locks in ~1.1% gain and gives the trend room. Broker targets Rs 1,143. Keep target 1100."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, SL at 119 gives ~3.7% room. Gold consolidating with Fed Apr 29 FOMC as key catalyst. VIX rising supports the hedge thesis. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.0,
      "new_target": 1470.0,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position near flat (+0.2%). Made 52w high 1430.90 today then faded to 1415. Q4 was exceptional. Leaving SL at 1405 (essentially breakeven/entry). Trimming target from 1500 to 1470 — more realistic given post-results premium already priced in and crude input headwinds flagged. No-op SL (equals current), but target change justifies MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 4,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.6%, SL 1035 gives ~1.3% downside. Apr 27 (Monday) board meeting is binary event risk — audited Q4, dividend, fund-raise. CASA slippage to 28.4% is a yellow flag. Stock near 52w high into results = asymmetric downside. Keeping tight SL 1035; will reassess post-results. If pre-results drift triggers SL, better to be out than surprised."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 678.0,
      "new_target": 725.0,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 4,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%, near 52w high into Apr 29 Q4 print (binary event). Trailing SL to 678 (just below entry 681 — locks near-breakeven). Tightening target from 740 to 725 given stock already at top of analyst band 587-687 and event risk. Shooting Star on Apr 22 also warns of exhaustion."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.7%, SL 2260 gives ~2% more room. Apr 30 Q4 results upcoming — catalyst. Today -2.57% on weak tape but above 52w low. Defensive FMCG thesis intact. SL holds."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, SL 393 gives ~2% room. Near 52w high 407.25, healthy consolidation. Q4 results May 15 (outside window concern). Hold with current SL."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.0,
      "reasoning": "Worst position in book (-6.2%) but Q4 fundamentals strong and SL not yet breached. Let the stop do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.0,
      "reasoning": "Fix inverted SL (was above CMP). Lock in gain while letting winner run to 1100."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.0,
      "reasoning": "Hedge function; FOMC next week is the catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.0,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, target trimmed to 1470 for realism."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.0,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL pre-results (Apr 27). Let mechanics protect capital."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 678.0,
      "reasoning": "Trail to near-breakeven ahead of Apr 29 results; stock at 52w high + Shooting Star = exhaustion risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.0,
      "reasoning": "Give thesis room into Apr 30 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 393.0,
      "reasoning": "Position near flat, SL intact, healthy setup."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "OFSS: Q4 beat with 50%+ EBIT margin is impressive; +8.9% yesterday leaves it extended — watch for pullback to 8400-8500 for entry. DRREDDY: Semaglutide catalyst real but Citi Sell + extended move today = wait for consolidation. PPLPHARMA: parabolic 10% in 3 days into Apr 28 results is too extended; pass. HUDCO: governance red flags (board fine, director exits) offset the momentum; skip. CLEAN: 12.8x volume with flat price and near-52w-low setup is ambiguous; wait for clarity. ABSLAMC: CIO resignation is key-man risk; peers (HDFC AMC) preferred.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 68% deployed with 8 positions across banking/HFC/FMCG/gold/pharma/energy — adequately diversified but no room for adds given deployment-hysteresis rule (>60% + flat-to-negative session). Four binary earnings events in next 7 days (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30, plus FOMC Apr 29). Strategy: manage SLs tight on winners (PNBHOUSING, GRANULES trailed), accept tight SLs on AUBANK into results, and NO new entries today. Fixed PNBHOUSING's inverted stop — that was a latent risk that could have triggered an accidental exit on any minor pullback. VIX rising + IT collapse = keep powder dry."
}
